title: Change text column to hyperlink column (with Zendesk ticket URL)
excerpt:

posts.author: sergeipetrov (Sergei Petrov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone,

We have a challenge with our monday board. We use Zendesk and have a text column containing Zendesk ticket numbers, for example “12345”. We are trying to convert this column into a link column so that the Zendesk ticket appears as a link.

Is it possible to use the contents of the text column to automatically populate a new link column like this:

Old Text Column: 12345
New Link Column: https://companyname.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/12345

It’s difficult to do it by hand as there are hundreds of entries in the board.

Thanks in advance

Sergei

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@sergeipetrov

The simplest solution would be to use General Caster (in monday app marketplace) or create a simple Integromat scenario.

Jim - The Monday Man channel
